src.osir_service.osir_service.agent package

Submodules

src.osir_service.osir_service.agent.AgentService module

class src.osir_service.osir_service.agent.AgentService.CeleryWorker[source]

Bases: object

Orchestrates distributed forensic task execution using Celery.

This class manages the lifecycle of OSIR workers, handling communication with RabbitMQ (broker) and Redis (backend).

__init__()[source]

Initializes the Celery worker by setting up the broker and backend configurations, queues, and registering task handlers.

start_worker()[source]

Starts multiple Celery workers based on system resources and configuration, managing different task queues for processing.

Module contents
